title: The company demonstrates a commitment to quality through a culture that permeates at all levels
Management is responsible and accountable for quality
Management demonstrates commitment to quality through their actions and behaviours
The organisational structure and allocation of roles supports the SQM
Resource requirements including financial resources are planned
Engagement teams comprehend and fulfill their responsibilities
Direction, supervision, and review of engagement teams is appropriate
Engagement teams apply appropriate professional judgment
Consultations on challenging issues are performed and conclusions implemented
Differences of opinion are resolved
Engagement documentation is prepared promptly
Personnel are committed, developed, retained with competence and skills
Personnel demonstrate commitment to quality through actions
Personnel develop and maintain appropriate competence
When insufficient personnel, the company uses service providers appropriately
Engagement team members are designated for each engagement
The information system captures and maintains relevant quality information
The company culture recognises responsibility to share information
Relevant information is exchanged within the company and with engagement teams
Information exchange occurs throughout the entire company
Relevant information is communicated to external parties including network
Monitoring and remediation process provides relevant information about the SQM
Monitoring activities establish a foundation for the SQM evaluation
Nature, timing, and extent of monitoring activities are determined
Inspection of completed engagements is incorporated into monitoring
Policies mandate independence and objectivity of monitoring individuals
The company assesses findings to ascertain deficiencies
